title: RECOVERY CAFÉ - 211info
text: RECLAIMING LIVES RECOVERY CAFÉ Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides recovery circles for individuals with alcohol and substances use disorders. Services include peer support mentoring, various classes including relapse prevention, meals and espresso-style coffee when attending the recovery circles, and family member support. 228 East Main Street Suite H Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Recovery Café: Age 18 and older who are 24 hours clean and sober Peer services and relapse prevention classes: Age 18 and older Hours: Recovery Café: Sunday 4pm-6:30pm, Monday-Tuesday 5pm-7:30pm El Camino Seguro: Thursday 5pm-7:30pm Educational classes: 5 days per week, times vary Peer support and office hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 326-1233 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 326-1233 Español (541) 326-2658 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Recovery Cafe is held at 226 E Main Street in Medford, next to Vogel Plaza in downtown. Services: General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups Relapse Prevention Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RECLAIMING LIVES
